title: Uruguayan Energizing Hash
description: A traditional Uruguayan breakfast dish with a boost of energy from dense ingredients. This recipe serves a hearty plate of energizing hash.
instructions: 1. Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add diced chorizo and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Add shredded hash browns and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
4. Add rolled oatmeal and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
5. Add ground cumin and stir to combine.
6. Create 2 wells in the hash and crack an egg into each well.
7. Cook until the eggs are cooked to your desired doneness.
